title: Citrus Crumble Bread
description: A refreshing twist on traditional bread, this citrus crumble bread combines the flavors of citrus zest and rye bread with a crunchy crumble topping.
instructions: In a large bowl, whisk together orange zest, lemon peel, and sugar.
Add cubed rye bread and toss until bread is evenly coated.
In a separate bowl, whisk together flour and cold butter until crumbly.
Add citrusy crumble topping to the bread mixture and toss until combined.
In a separate bowl, whisk together eggs and beaten eggs.
Pour egg mixture over the bread mixture and toss until bread is evenly coated.
Transfer bread mixture to a greased 9x13-inch baking dish.
Bake for 35-40 minutes or until golden brown.
Let cool for 10 minutes before serving.
